## Checklist

- [ ] SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter (`name`, `description`)
- [ ] Skill directory name matches frontmatter `name`
- [ ] Tested with at least one real input
- [ ] Output follows RMBC methodology principles
- [ ] No API keys, personal paths, or secrets included
- [ ] Updated README skill count if adding/removing a skill
